tasks.title: Upgrade Copilot Chat to local Ollama coding agent
tasks.summary: Make GitHub Copilot Chat use a Copilot-only local Ollama workflow with Hermes 3 planning, Phi-4 architecture, Qwen2.5-Coder coding, nomic-embed-text search, and SuperRoo Memory Explorer long-term memory.
notes: This local agent is scoped only to GitHub Copilot Chat.
Other coding extensions must keep their own routing and must not be migrated to this workflow.
Role map: planner hermes3, architect phi4, coding qwen2.5-coder:7b, complex coding qwen2.5-coder:14b, embeddings nomic-embed-text.
Verified all requested Ollama models are READY.
Smoke test completed through Hermes 3 planner, Phi-4 architect, Qwen2.5-Coder 7B coder, and SuperRoo Memory Explorer.

tasks.title: Sync GitHub Copilot tasks with SuperRoo
tasks.summary: Track GitHub Copilot work through .github/copilot-tasks.json and synchronize it into the shared SuperRoo global task registry and ACTIVE_WORK board.
notes: Copilot Chat/API fallback now uses scripts/copilot-ollama-fallback.mjs.
Fallback tries Codex Brain smart_code first, then direct Ollama qwen2.5-coder:7b if Codex Brain is unavailable.
Copilot task sync is wired into scripts/sync-tasks-bidirectional.mjs and ACTIVE_WORK.md generation.
Phase Breakdown Monitor event hooks are tracked as a completed follow-up task.

tasks.title: Wire phase breakdown monitor event hooks
tasks.summary: Continue the Copilot monitor-agent task by automatically sending new feature, bug, debug-team, and debug/triage job events to the Phase Breakdown Monitor Agent.
notes: The monitor agent receives feature creation events when the request looks like new feature/app planning or complex architecture work.
Bug reports, debug-team starts, and generic debug/triage jobs now enqueue phase-breakdown-monitor-agent jobs with event context.
